Hero.titlePrefix: Master new skills with courses that
Hero.subtitle: Knowledge OS brings expert-led courses, hands-on projects, and a supportive community together in one place — so you learn faster and remember longer.

WhyKnowledgeOs.title: Built for people who learn by doing
WhyKnowledgeOs.subtitle: Everything about the platform is designed around one goal: getting you from curious to capable, faster.

expert-led.title: Expert-led curriculum
expert-led.description: Every course is built and taught by practitioners who ship real products, not just slides.

hands-on.title: Hands-on projects
hands-on.description: Apply what you learn immediately with graded projects that mirror real production work.

self-paced.title: Learn at your pace
self-paced.description: Lifetime access, downloadable resources, and progress that syncs across every device.

community.title: Community & mentorship
community.description: Get unblocked fast with cohort discussions, office hours, and instructor feedback.

LearningExperience.title: A lesson player built for focus
LearningExperience.subtitle: No clutter, no distractions — just the video, your chapters, and your progress, all in one place.
LearningExperience.capabilityPlayer: Interactive lesson player with speed and caption controls
LearningExperience.capabilityProgress: Progress tracking that syncs across every device
LearningExperience.capabilityResources: Downloadable project files and reference resources

items.quote: Knowledge OS is the first platform where the projects actually look like the codebase I work in every day. I shipped my first production feature two weeks after starting.
items.name: Amara Osei

items.quote: The instructor feedback loop is what sold me. I've tried three other platforms and none of them got me unblocked as fast as the office hours here.
items.name: Liam Fischer

items.quote: I went from designing mockups to shipping a full design system in twelve weeks. The pacing and the community kept me accountable the whole way.
items.name: Noor Al-Sayed

items.question: How long do I have access to a course?
items.answer: Lifetime access. Once you enroll, every lesson, project file, and future update to that course is yours to keep — no expiration, no subscription required to keep watching.

items.question: What's your refund policy?
items.answer: If a course isn't the right fit, you can request a full refund within 30 days of purchase, no questions asked.

items.question: Do I get a certificate when I finish a course?
items.answer: Yes. Every completed course issues a shareable certificate with a verification link you can add to your resume or LinkedIn profile.

items.question: Are courses self-paced or scheduled?
items.answer: All courses are self-paced by default. Select cohort-based courses also offer scheduled live sessions with instructors if you want more structure.

items.question: I'm new to the field — where should I start?
items.answer: Filter Featured Courses by the "Beginner" difficulty tag, or start with our Learning Experience guide, which recommends a path based on your goals.

items.question: Do you offer plans for teams?
items.answer: Yes. Team plans include centralized billing, progress dashboards for managers, and bulk seat discounts. Reach out through the contact link in the footer to get started.

Cta.title: Ready to start learning?
Cta.subtitle: Join thousands of learners building real skills with Knowledge OS. Cancel anytime.
